violations.text: Pork, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Pork was placed hot in the refrigerator in covered containers greater than four inches deep. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

Utensils in the kitchen are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the mixer, and prep room lowboy have an accumulation of frozen condensate and debris. Wall-mounted fan in the kitchen has an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
Shellstock tags did not have all of the required information, lacking the date the last one was used. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
Cooked eggplant observed with a date mark exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer and ice machine have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. The chest freezers have an accumulation of frost. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The floor in the walk in freezer has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust and mold. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2024
